Independent Filmmaker & Editor

Crafting Stories That Resonate

Biography

About Aleksei

Aleksei Borovikov is an award-winning independent filmmaker and editor with a journalistic background. He began his career working on regional and national television in Russia for 15 years. Aleksei graduated from a two-year Directing program at Moscow Film School and earned a Master of Fine Arts in Cinema Directing from Columbia College Chicago.

His films have been screened in over 150 festivals worldwide and are featured on US, Polish, and Taiwanese streaming platforms. Besides his creative endeavors, Aleksei judges submissions for multiple film festivals across the United States, including Outfest Los Angeles, Reeling, and Chicago International Children's Film Festival.

Production Services

Postproduction Services

Complete film and video editing editing services. From script pacing adjustments and structural story editing to final motion graphics, color correction, and sound sync.

Commercial Production

Tailored video advertisements, corporate reels, and promotional videos designed to present your business or creative products effectively to a wider audience.

Got a project? Let's discuss!
